channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available for officers and ratings on general and bulk cargo vessels. Required experience varies by rank, with specific seagoing service needed for Master, Chief Officer, Deck Officers, Engineers, Electrician, Ordinary Seaman, Cook, and Fitter. Contract durations range from 3 to 5 months depending on the position. Competitive wages are offered, along with social and health insurance. Opportunities for career development and stable employment are highlighted.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Officer and Rating Vacancies on Bulk Carriers at Navigation Maritime Bulgare Limited (NAVIBULGAR)

item.description:
Location: Trinidad / Suriname, Worldwide
Description:

Multiple maritime vacancies are available for various ranks including Master, Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer, 3rd Engineer, Electrician, and ETO. Positions are open on PSV DP2, Bulk Carrier, Container, and Oil Tanker vessels. Contract durations vary from 8 weeks ON/OFF to 4 months +/-1. Joining dates are throughout June, July, and August 2026. Relevant experience and specific visas may be required. Contact for further details.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Officer Engineer Vacancies at Mariner Crewing Management

item.description:
Location: Aberdeen, United Kingdom
Description:

Vessel management services and solutions are offered by Vroon Offshore Services. Shipboard job opportunities are available, including roles for Second Engineer, Cook, and Deckhand. An open application process is in place for those whose ideal job is not currently listed. Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their details to discuss potential suitable vacancies within the company.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Shipboard Jobs - Vroon Offshore Services at Vroon Offshore Services Ltd.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for various maritime positions including Superior Officers (Master, Chief Engineer, Chief Mate, 2nd Engineer), Junior Officers (2nd Officer, 3rd Officer, 3rd Engineer, 4th Engineer), Ratings (PMP, Bosun, A/B, O/S, MM, MM/Fitter, Cook), and Cadets. Standard contract duration is 5 months +/- 1 month, with a shorter duration for cadets. Interested candidates are invited to submit their CV using the provided template and form.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Officer and Ratings Vacancies at Histria Shipmanagement S.R.L.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime job openings are available across various vessel types including Pure Chemical Tankers, Oil/Chemical Tankers, Bulk Carriers, MPV/General Cargo, Container/General Cargo, Passenger Vessels, and General Cargo Vessels. Open ranks include Master, Chief Officer, Second Officer, Third Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, Third Engineer, Fourth Engineer, ETO, Engine Fitter, AB, and Bosun. Specific requirements, joining details, and HR contacts are available in the provided banners.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Merchant Navy Job Openings - Various Ranks and Vessels at Merchant Navy Decoded Jobs

item.description:
Location: Massachusetts Maritime Academy
Description:

A Shipbuilding Expert is sought to support an international U.S.-Finland workforce development project focused on shipbuilding skills, particularly for ice-capable vessel construction. The role is based at Massachusetts Maritime Academy. This position is part of a U.S. Department of Labor/ILAB-funded initiative aimed at strengthening the shipbuilding workforce and fostering cooperation between the United States and Finland.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Shipbuilding Expert Job at Massachusetts Maritime Academy at NEXTSEAS

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Production Manager is sought to oversee daily production and shipping operations for coal transportation, maximizing fleet productivity and ensuring efficient, timely delivery. Responsibilities include monitoring vessel performance, coordinating with stakeholders, and ensuring compliance with maritime regulations. A Bachelor's degree in a relevant field and a minimum of 5 years of managerial experience in shipping or coal logistics are required, along with ANT III/IV certification. Strong leadership and analytical skills are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Production Manager Job - Coal Transportation at Trans Energy Indonesia

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Urgent vacancies are available for Chief Engineer, Second Officer, Crane Operator, Able Seaman, and Oiler on a tanker vessel operating under a Saudi Aramco project. Chief Engineer requires 2 years experience and STCW Code III/2. Second Officer requires 1 year experience as WKO and STCW Code II/1. Crane Operator requires 1 year experience and relevant certificates. AB and Oiler require 2 years experience. Contract duration is 3 months or 180 days, unpaid rotation. Joining is upon visa and approval issuance. Candidates must have a passport valid for at least 1 year and all certificates valid for 12 months. No GCC visas allowed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Ranks - Tanker Vessel at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Noida Sector 18 Office
Description:

Opportunities are available for a Marine Superintendent and a Marine Assurance/HSEQ Superintendent to join a team managing a fleet of Tankers worldwide. The roles involve ensuring safety, managing audits, and supporting sea staff. Candidates should have senior seagoing rank or shore-based HSSEQ experience, with strong knowledge of ISM/TMSA and vetting regimes. Previous Master Mariner or senior deck experience is beneficial for the Marine Superintendent role.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Superintendent QHSE Superintendent Jobs at Carbon Shipping

item.description:
Location: Europe, Norway, West Africa, UK, Middle East, Taiwan
Description:

Several maritime positions are available for experienced seafarers, including Masters, Chief Mates, Chief Engineers, 2nd Mates, SDPOs, Mechanics, Radio Operators, 1st Engineers, ABs, Barge Pilots, and Riggers. Vacancies are on various vessel types such as CTVs, Drillships, General Cargo vessels, Multipurpose Offshore Vessels, Jack Up Barges, Cutter Suction Dredgers, and Shoalbusters. Embarkation dates range from July to September 2026, with contract durations varying from 2 to 12 weeks. Opportunities are located in Europe, Norway, West Africa, the UK, the Middle East, and Taiwan.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Job Vacancies - Various Ranks and Vessels at ORCA Crew Services
